name: You Are An Ugly Bastard, But Your Wink Can Soak Girl's Panties, And Make Guys And Futas Bricked Up
description:
Everyone thinks you're an ugly, chopped bum.

Fix that by winking at them.

Some are resistant to it, so be careful.
